'use strict'; const utils = require('./utils'); module.exports = (ast, options = {}) => { const stringify = (node, parent = {}) => { const invalidBlock = options.escapeInvalid && utils.isInvalidBrace(parent); const invalidNode = node.invalid === true && options.escapeInvalid === true; let output = ''; if (node.value) { if ((invalidBlock || invalidNode) && utils.isOpenOrClose(node)) { return '\\' + node.value; } return node.value; } if (node.value) { return node.value; } if (node.nodes) { for (const child of node.nodes) { output += stringify(child); } } return output; }; return stringify(ast); };
